# Radical Earth Studio

> An emerging architecture practice specialising in experiential hospitality and luxury residential design with an eco-conscious approach.

Radical Earth Studio designs context-led, exploratory and experiential architecture for hospitality and high-end residential projects. The practice works at the intersection of experiential hospitality architecture and luxury residential design, with a strong commitment to ecological responsibility and community engagement.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the studio, selected works, and design ethos.
- [Selected Works](/projects): Portfolio of hospitality and residential architecture projects.
- [Studio](/studio): About the practice, design philosophy, and director Alexander Konchev.
- [Approach](/approach): The studio's four-step design process and methodology.
- [Collaborate](/collaborate): Information on partnerships, commissions, and working with the studio.
- [Journal](/blog): Essays on context, ecology, and the craft of building places that belong.

## Projects

- [House Nonna](/projects/house-nonna): A single-family home in Bishopscourt, Cape Town inspired by heritage cottages and dramatic landscape.
- [Wellness Retreat](/projects/wellness-retreat): A desert wellness sanctuary in the UAE comprising private villas and a communal gathering pavilion.
- [Delta Leaf Lodge](/projects/delta-leaf-lodge): A conceptual luxury lodge in the Okavango Delta, Botswana inspired by delta leaf geometry and built with lightweight sustainable materials.

## Journal

- [Designing From the Ground Up](/blog/designing-from-the-ground-up): How context, nature, and community shape extraordinary African architecture.
